tagline: Your Social Media, Finally Under Control

scenes.voiceover: Running a business is hard. Managing social media shouldn't be.
scenes.visual_description: Close-up of a tired small business owner at 11pm, desk covered with papers, multiple phone screens glowing with social media notifications, dark moody lighting, realistic portrait photography, subtle blue screen glow

scenes.voiceover: ZunoSync brings all your channels into one beautiful dashboard.
scenes.visual_description: Bright modern laptop screen showing ZunoSync clean dashboard interface, social media icons arranged beautifully, entrepreneur smiling with relief, warm natural lighting, shallow depth of field, professional commercial photography

scenes.voiceover: Schedule posts in seconds. Watch your engagement soar. Focus on what you love - your business.
scenes.visual_description: Business owner typing quickly then pausing to smile at growing social media metrics on screen, charts and engagement numbers rising, coffee cup nearby, bright inspiring office setting, warm golden hour lighting, authentic lifestyle photography

scenes.voiceover: Join 10,000+ businesses who chose simplicity. Start free today.
scenes.visual_description: Clean modern screen showing large Get Started button in brand blue, happy diverse business owners celebrating, subtle confetti particles in brand colors, professional product photography, confident and inviting atmosphere
